title: Subject pronouns
communication_goal: Identificar personas y cosas y formar frases básicas con I, you, he, she, it, we y they.
cefr_objectives: Can use subject pronouns in short statements.
explanation_es: Los pronombres personales sustituyen a nombres. En inglés el sujeto normalmente aparece antes del verbo: I am, she is, they are. It se usa para objetos, animales o situaciones cuando no hablamos de una persona.
spanish_speaker_notes: No omitas el sujeto como en español: I am tired, no am tired.
He es él y she es ella.
You puede significar tú, usted, ustedes o vosotros según el contexto.
It no se usa normalmente para personas.

lessons.title: I, you and introductions
lessons.objective: Usar I y you para presentarse y preguntar el nombre.

activities.prompt: ___ am Maria.
activities.feedback_correct: I significa yo.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La persona habla de sí misma: I.

activities.prompt: ___ are my friend.
activities.feedback_correct: You se refiere a la persona con quien hablas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La frase habla directamente con otra persona.

activities.prompt: am / I / Ana
activities.feedback_correct: El sujeto va antes de am.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con I.

activities.prompt: I
activities.feedback_correct: I significa yo.
activities.feedback_incorrect: You significa tú; I significa yo.

activities.prompt: Am Carlos.
activities.feedback_correct: En inglés necesitamos el sujeto I.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Añade I antes de am.

activities.prompt: I am David.
activities.feedback_correct: La voz habla de sí misma.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la palabra inicial.

activities.instruction: Graba I am y You are.
activities.prompt: I am. You are.
activities.feedback_correct: Mantén clara la diferencia entre I y you.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha el modelo y repite lentamente.

activities.prompt: I am Leo. You are my teacher.
activities.question: Who is the teacher?
activities.feedback_correct: You representa a la persona a quien Leo habla.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La respuesta está en la segunda frase.

activities.prompt: Write your name and say who you are speaking to.
activities.feedback_correct: Usaste el pronombre del hablante.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con I am... .

activities.prompt: Say your name and ask: What is your name?
activities.feedback_correct: La conversación inicia correctamente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa I am... y What is your name?

lessons.title: He, she and it
lessons.objective: Identificar personas y objetos con he, she e it.

activities.prompt: ___ is my sister.
activities.feedback_correct: She se usa para una mujer o niña.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Sister es una mujer o niña: she.

activities.prompt: ___ is my brother.
activities.feedback_correct: He se usa para un hombre o niño.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Brother es un hombre o niño: he.

activities.prompt: ___ is a book.
activities.feedback_correct: It se usa para una cosa.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Book es un objeto: it.

activities.prompt: is / She / my / friend
activities.feedback_correct: She va antes de is.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con She.

activities.prompt: It is my mother.
activities.feedback_correct: Para una persona usamos she.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Mother es una persona, no una cosa.

activities.prompt: She is a teacher.
activities.feedback_correct: Escuchaste she.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La palabra tiene el sonido /ʃ/.

activities.prompt: He is here. She is here. It is here.
activities.feedback_correct: Distingue she de he y el sonido corto de it.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica el contraste /h/ y /ʃ/.

activities.prompt: This is Emma. She is my sister. This is a phone. It is new.
activities.question: What is new?
activities.feedback_correct: It representa the phone.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la frase con It.

activities.instruction: Describe una persona y un objeto.
activities.prompt: Write one sentence with he or she and one with it.
activities.feedback_correct: Distinguiste persona y objeto.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa he/she para personas e it para objetos.

activities.instruction: Describe personas y objetos en una foto imaginaria.
activities.prompt: Tell the AI who two people are and identify one object.
activities.feedback_correct: La IA comprueba el pronombre según el referente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Primero decide: persona o cosa.

lessons.title: We and they
lessons.objective: Hablar de grupos usando we y they.

activities.prompt: ___ are students.
activities.feedback_correct: We significa nosotros o nosotras.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La frase habla de un grupo que incluye al hablante.

activities.prompt: ___ are my parents.
activities.feedback_correct: They significa ellos o ellas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Parents es un grupo de personas: they.

activities.prompt: are / We / friends
activities.feedback_correct: We va antes de are.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con We.

activities.prompt: they
activities.feedback_correct: They se refiere a otras personas o cosas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: We es nosotros; they es ellos o ellas.

activities.prompt: They is my friends.
activities.feedback_correct: They usa are, no is.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Con they usamos are.

activities.prompt: We are at home.
activities.feedback_correct: El hablante se incluye en el grupo.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha el primer pronombre.

activities.prompt: We are ready. They are ready.
activities.feedback_correct: Mantén la /w/ de we y la fricción suave de they.
activities.feedback_incorrect: No conviertas we en be ni they en day.

activities.prompt: We are a family. They are our neighbors.
activities.question: Who are the neighbors?
activities.feedback_correct: They representa a los vecinos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Mira la segunda frase.

activities.prompt: Write one sentence with we and one with they.
activities.feedback_correct: Las dos perspectivas están claras.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Recuerda we are y they are.

activities.instruction: Habla de tu grupo y de otro grupo.
activities.prompt: Tell the AI who you are with and who another group is.
activities.feedback_correct: Usaste we y they con referentes claros.
activities.feedback_incorrect: We incluye al hablante; they no lo incluye.

lessons.title: Pronouns in real conversation
lessons.objective: Usar todos los pronombres en una conversación y transferirlos a información nueva.

activities.prompt: I am Luis. She is my sister. We are from Peru. They are our friends.
activities.feedback_correct: El audio identifica personas y grupos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha sister, we y friends.

activities.prompt: He is my teacher. She is my classmate. They are students.
activities.question: Who is the teacher?
activities.feedback_correct: He es el profesor.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La primera frase da la respuesta.

activities.prompt: A phone is on the table.
activities.feedback_correct: It representa phone.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Phone es una cosa: it.

activities.prompt: A: Who is Ana? B: It is my sister.
activities.feedback_correct: Una hermana es una persona: she.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Sister necesita she.

activities.instruction: Lee el diálogo con ritmo natural.
activities.prompt: I am Luis. She is my sister. We are friends. They are teachers.
activities.feedback_correct: La meta es mantener el pronombre claro en frases conectadas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Haz énfasis ligero en cada pronombre al practicar.

activities.prompt: I am Nina. He is my brother. She is my friend. We are at school. They are our teachers.
activities.question: How many relationships or groups are mentioned?
activities.correct_answer: Four: brother, friend, we and teachers.
activities.feedback_correct: Identificaste varias referencias.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cuenta brother, friend, we y teachers.

activities.instruction: Escribe cinco frases sobre una imagen imaginaria.
activities.prompt: Use I, he, she, it, we or they at least once.
activities.feedback_correct: Las frases conectan pronombres y referentes.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Comprueba cada sujeto con am, is o are.

activities.instruction: Conversa con la IA sobre tu clase.
activities.prompt: Introduce yourself, identify one classmate, one teacher, one object and your group.
success_criteria: uses I, he or she, it and we or they
activities.feedback_correct: La IA corrige solo el error más importante por turno.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA ofrece opciones en español y pide reformulación.

activities.prompt: Look around you and say who or what is present using three different pronouns.
activities.feedback_correct: Usaste el contenido fuera de las frases memorizadas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Señala una persona, otra persona o grupo y un objeto.

activities.prompt: Introduce yourself, describe two people, one object and one group, then answer one question from the AI.
activities.feedback_correct: Tema dominado: puedes elegir pronombres según el referente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Repite la lección relacionada con el pronombre que causó dificultad.
